# Class AccessProfile

The AccessProfile class provides access to DOCUMENTS access profiles.

## Methods

### addCustomProperty

`addCustomProperty(name: string, type: string, value: string): CustomProperty`

Creates a new CustomProperty for the AccessProfile.
